ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Type of work class (e.g., Private, State-gov) */,
  "final_weight" INTEGER /* Final weight assigned to the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the education level */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain reported */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss reported */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "disability" INTEGER /* Presence of any disability */,
  "veteran" INTEGER /* Veteran status */,
  "citizen" INTEGER /* Citizenship status */,
  "employment_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment in years */,
  "employment_industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_bracket"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educations ("education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, State-gov) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "workclass_category" TEXT /* Category of work class (e.g., government, private) */,
  "workclass_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education type */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_category" TEXT /* Category of education (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "education_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "occupation_category" TEXT /* Category of occupation (e.g., management, technical) */,
  "occupation_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_category" TEXT /* Category of marital status (e.g., married, unmarried) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "race_category" TEXT /* Category of race (e.g., Asian, African American) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket definition (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "income_bracket_range" TEXT /* Range of income bracket (e.g., $0-$50,000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)
column_names: Type of work class (e.g., Private, State-gov)
Final weight assigned to the individual
Numerical representation of the education level
Country of origin of the individual
Unique identifier for each work class
Name of the work class (e.g., Private, State-gov)
Category of work class (e.g., government, private)
Unique identifier for each education type
Category of education (e.g., high school, college)
Unique identifier for each marital status
Category of marital status (e.g., married, unmarried)
Category of race (e.g., Asian, African American)
Unique identifier for each income level
